text:
Memobottle is a registered B Corp, and proud partner of Water.org. Want to learn more about our story and mission? Click here.

Since 2016, Memobottle has proudly supported Water.org, an international nonprofit organisation that positively transforms millions of lives around the world with access to safe water and sanitation.

2-Year Warranty on all Memobottle products

memobottle

FINAL CALL for Father's Day
ENDS SOON   FREE SILICONE SLEEVE

Last chance to deck out dad's new favourite water bottle for free.

Get in quick to claim your free matching Silicone Sleeve, when you purchase an Original memobottle*.

SHOP NOW

*One free Silicone Sleeve of your choice with any Original memobottle purchase. The free Silicone Sleeve size must correspond to the Original memobottle size purchased. To claim, add your chosen Silicone Sleeve to your cart, no code needed.

Offer ends 4 September, 11:59pm AEST. Subject to availability, while stock lasts.

memobottle

LAST CHANCE TO DONATE AND WIN
DONATE AND WIN
50c from every order will be donated to HalfCut
MEMOBOTTLE X HALFCUT

The countdown begins!

Memobottle co-founders Jesse and Jonno will be participating in the HalfCut challenge on World HalfCut Day, August 31st.

They'll be shaving off half their moustaches, right down the middle, to raise funds to keep the Daintree thriving and in the hands of its Traditional Owners for generations to come.

There's still time for you to get involved
Open to Australian & New Zealand residents

Make a $25 donation on our fundraising page, and be in the running to win over $1,000 worth of prizes, including:
① A3 Daily Tote ② $100 Memobottle gift card ③ A5 memobottle bundle + matching Desk Stand ④ Slim memobottle bundle + matching Desk Stand ⑤ A6 Stainless Steel memobottle + matching Desk Stand ⑥ A7 Stainless Steel memobottle + matching Desk Stand ⑦ A whole year's supply of Ben & Jerry's ice cream — that's 52 pints of your favourite flavours!

DONATE AND WIN

Join us on IG for the big shave

It's all going down on Instagram. Join Jesse and Jonno as one side of their faces get a little colder.

SUNDAY, 31 AUGUST
8AM AEST

FOLLOW US ON INSTAGRAM

memobottle

Pass Father's Day with flying colours
FATHER'S DAY OFFER   FREE SILICONE SLEEVE*

For a limited time only, receive a complimentary matching Silicone Sleeve of your choice when you get dad an Original memobottle*.

Whether you want classic like Black Ink, or bright like Mandarin, we've got 10 shades to create the perfect customised gift he'll carry everywhere.

SHOP NOW

Dad-approved colours

With various colours and sizes to select from, we turned to our Memo-dads for their recommendations — check out our team's picks below.

JESSE'S PICK
Slim memobottle in Cool Grey
"It's the perfect neutral shade, and also reminds me of my sketching markers back at uni. It's ridiculous how well the Slim fits in my backpack. It's easy to grab on the go, and never gets lost thanks to its length."
SHOP THE SLIM MEMOBOTTLE

JONNO'S PICK
A5 memobottle in Cool Grey
"I drink a lot of water (4-5L a day), so the A5 makes the most sense for me. I'm loving the clean, minimal look and feel of the Cool Grey — sits nicely alongside the things that I'm carrying and the clothes that I'm wearing."
SHOP THE A5 MEMOBOTTLE

JOEY'S PICK
A6 memobottle in Sea Mist
"My favourite colour is Sea Mist because it reminds me of going to the beach with my kids. I love the A6 — it fits in my bag while still having good capacity, so less trips to fill it up."
SHOP THE A6 MEMOBOTTLE
